tabs.title: Tab

tabs.content:
// limit 100 første
bitcoinstock
| take 100 


bitcoinstock
| order by Time desc 
|take 10


bitcoinstock
| order by Time desc 
| project Time, Current, EventEnqueuedUtcTime
|take 10


bitcoinstock
| order by Time desc 
| project Time, unixtime_seconds_todatetime(Time), Current, EventEnqueuedUtcTime
|take 10



bitcoinstock
| order by Time desc 
| project Time, UnixTimestamp=unixtime_seconds_todatetime(Time), Current, EventEnqueuedUtcTime
|take 10

bitcoinstock
| project EventEnqueuedUtcTime,Current

bitcoinstock
| count

// Use 'take' to view a sample number of records in the table and check the data.
bitcoinaggdata
| take 100


bitcoinstock 
| count

bitcoinstock 
| project EventEnqueuedUtcTime, Current
